description: Canonical AccessDecision serialization vectors (allow and deny)

vectors.name: access_allowed_same_unit

input.reason: Same unit access: role is within 'D1-R1-D2'

vectors.expected_canonical_json: {"allowed": true, "audit_details": {"access_path": "same_unit", "item_id": "doc-42", "role_address": "D1-R1-D2-R2", "step": "4a"}, "reason": "Same unit access: role is within 'D1-R1-D2'", "step_failed": null, "valid_until": null}

vectors.name: access_denied_missing_clearance

input.reason: No clearance found for role at address 'D1-R1-D3-R1'

vectors.expected_canonical_json: {"allowed": false, "audit_details": {"detail": "missing_clearance", "item_id": "doc-99", "role_address": "D1-R1-D3-R1", "step": 1}, "reason": "No clearance found for role at address 'D1-R1-D3-R1'", "step_failed": 1, "valid_until": null}
